Article.ArticleTitle: Frequency-dependent adaptations in energy expenditure, strength, mood, and inflammation following 16 to 32 weeks of combined aerobic and resistance training in older women.

AffiliationInfo.Affiliation: Department of Nutrition Sciences, University of Alabama at Birmingham (UAB), Birmingham, AL, 35294-3360, USA. amelshak@uab.edu.

MedlineCitation.CoiStatement: Declarations. Conflict of interest: The authors declare no competing interests.
